item_type.name: Heal character
item_type.description: Restore HP and cure statuses of a character. HP restored = param1 x 50 (clamped to max HP).

item_type.name: Revive character
item_type.description: Revive a KO character with 1/8 of max HP and cure statuses.

item_type.name: Full revive character
item_type.description: Revive a KO character with full HP (Mega Phoenix like).

item_type.name: Heal GF
item_type.description: Restore HP of a Guardian Force. HP restored = param1 x 50.

item_type.name: Revive GF
item_type.description: Revive a KO Guardian Force with 1/8 of max HP.

item_type.name: Full revive GF
item_type.description: Revive a KO Guardian Force with full HP.

item_type.name: Full restore
item_type.description: Fully restore HP and cure statuses (Elixir/Megalixir like). Param2 is usually 0x7F (all curable statuses).

item_type.name: Battle only
item_type.description: Item only usable in battle (stones, Hero, Holy War...). The menu only checks the type, the battle effect is defined elsewhere.

item_type.name: Ammo
item_type.description: Ammunition for Irvine's Shot limit break.

item_type.name: Magazine
item_type.description: Readable magazine. The flags byte is dead data for magazines: the game never reads it and always behaves as if it was 0x11 (usable in menu, no target). Vanilla stores a magazine series id in it (1=Weapons Monthly, 2=Combat King, 3=Pet Pals, 4=Occult Fan) computed from param1 - 1 instead of param1, an off-by-one artifact of the original data tool.

item_type.name: Refine only
item_type.description: Item only used as refine material, it cannot be used from the menu.

item_type.name: Rename card
item_type.description: Open the Guardian Force renaming screen.

item_type.name: Pet nametag
item_type.description: Open the pet (Angelo) renaming screen. The game overrides the stored flags byte for this type.

item_type.name: Chocobo tag
item_type.description: Open the chocobo (Boko) renaming screen. The game overrides the stored flags byte for this type.

item_type.name: Magical lamp
item_type.description: Start the Diablos fight to obtain the Guardian Force. The game overrides the stored flags byte for this type.

item_type.name: Solomon ring
item_type.description: Grant the Doomtrain Guardian Force (if the required items are owned). The game overrides the stored flags byte for this type.

item_type.name: GF compatibility
item_type.description: Modify the compatibility between a character and Guardian Force(s). Internal value is clamped to [1000, 6000], lower is better. Displayed value = param2 / 5.

item_type.name: Teach GF ability
item_type.description: Teach an ability to a Guardian Force.

item_type.name: Forget ability
item_type.description: Open the menu to make a Guardian Force forget an ability (Amnesia Greens).

item_type.name: Quistis limit
item_type.description: Teach a Blue Magic limit break to Quistis. The game overrides the stored flags byte for this type.

item_type.name: Stat up
item_type.description: Permanently increase stat(s) of a character. Param1 is the amount added, param2 selects which stats.

item_type.name: Cure status
item_type.description: Cure specific statuses of a character without healing HP (Remedy like).

flag.name: Usable in menu
flag.description: The item can be used from the field menu (outside of battle).

flag.name: Target chara
flag.description: The item can target party characters.

flag.name: Target GF
flag.description: The item can target Guardian Forces.

flag.name: Target all
flag.description: The item automatically hits all valid targets.

flag.name: Target all both
flag.description: The item hits characters and Guardian Forces together.

flag.name: Target dead
flag.description: The item can be used on KO targets.

flag.name: Quistis only
flag.description: Force the target to party slot 3, used by Quistis limit items.

flag.name: GF compat others
flag.description: Also penalize the compatibility of the other Guardian Forces (GF compatibility type only).

param_type.name: unused
param_type.description: This parameter is not used by this item type.

param_type.name: heal_amount
param_type.description: HP restored = value x 50 (clamped to max HP).

values.name: Death
values.description: Cure Death, so revive the target (Phoenix Down like).

values.name: Reserved
values.description: Never curable, always kept unchecked in vanilla.

param_type.name: stat_mask
param_type.description: Permanent stat(s) increased by the item.

values.name: Unused
values.description: Unused bit, always kept unchecked in vanilla.

param_type.name: gf_target
param_type.description: Guardian Force whose compatibility is modified.

param_type.name: compatibility_amount
param_type.description: Compatibility change amount. Displayed value in game = value / 5.

param_type.name: magazine_first_page
param_type.description: First page of the magazine (index of an mmag.bin entry).

param_type.name: magazine_last_page
param_type.description: Last page of the magazine (index of an mmag.bin entry).

param_type.name: gf_ability
param_type.description: Ability taught to the Guardian Force (shared kernel.bin ability enum).

param_type.name: quistis_limit
param_type.description: Blue Magic limit break learned by Quistis (index in the kernel Blue-magic order).

param_type.name: stat_up_amount
param_type.description: Amount added to the selected stat(s).
